codeReview.summary: The mem-episodic-memory feature was already fully implemented in event_log.rs. The worker session (b2813252-22a3-4a6a-baaa-7b27dcbd3014) correctly identified that only a test module rename was needed to enable test discovery via 'cargo test -p swell-memory -- episodic'. The implementation satisfies all requirements: immutable timestamped events (tool_invocation, decision, observation, error, outcome) stored in append-only JSONL format.

summary: PASS - The episodic memory feature is correctly implemented. Event types (ToolInvocation, Decision, Observation, Error, Outcome) are captured with timestamps and stored immutably in append-only JSONL format. All 11 episodic tests pass. The worker correctly identified the implementation was complete and only needed to rename the test module from 'tests' to 'episodic' for test filter discovery to work. No blocking issues found - the 6 blocking issues in the synthesis were for other features (memory-pattern-learning, mem-decay-function, mem-deprecation, mem-scoping, mem-triple-stream-retrieval, mem-cross-encoder-rerank).
